entities.name: workout_tracker
entities.context: Python module providing database connection and initialization for workout tracking

entities.name: DuplicateGroup
entities.context: Data class representing a group of duplicate Fitbit observations sharing the same external_id

entities.name: DedupePlan
entities.context: Data class aggregating multiple DuplicateGroups into an executable deduplication plan

entities.name: build_plan
entities.context: Function that scans for duplicate Fitbit observations and produces a DedupePlan

entities.name: Fitbit
entities.context: Fitness tracking service whose workout observations are ingested and deduplicated

entities.name: SQLite
entities.context: Database backend used for storing workout observations

entities.name: external_id
entities.context: Identifier from Fitbit used to detect duplicate observations — duplicates share the same non-null external_id

relationships.context: build_plan produces a DedupePlan as its output
A DedupePlan contains a list of DuplicateGroups
workout_tracker module provides SQLite connection and DB initialization
build_plan scans for duplicates specifically from source='fitbit'
DuplicateGroup is keyed on external_id to identify which observations are duplicates
build_plan accepts a sqlite3.Connection to query for duplicates
